violations.description: Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of.-The establishment was preparing reduced oxygen food(Sous Vide) without a HACCP Plan in place. Manager has completed their HACCP training and are in the process of finalizing the written plan.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -They have not been completing their sanitation process by finishing with a sanitizer. We discussed the proper set up for the 3 compartment sink and the process.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.-No test strips were available for sanitizing.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
